title: Taittiriya Upanishad I: Speak the Truth
description: From the Taittiriya Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Taittiriya Upanishad I — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: Speak the truth. Practice virtue. Do not neglect study. After bringing the teacher his fee, do not cut off the line of progeny. Do not swerve from truth. Do not swerve from duty. Do not neglect what is good. Honor your mother as a god. Honor your father as a god. Honor your teacher as a god. Honor your guest as a god.
